## Analysts publish coverage update on CoreWeave (CRWV)

Sell-side attention on CRWV broadens institutional awareness for the AI compute leasing thesis; the absence of a disclosed rating or target limits the actionable signal today but signals growing coverage universe.

- Analyst coverage update on CoreWeave published alongside an unrelated Medline note.
- No specific rating, price target, or financial figure is disclosed in the headline.
- Coverage is additive to CRWV's institutional visibility as AI compute leasing demand narratives mature.
- Single-outlet story; no corroborating coverage to triangulate depth of analysis.
